steps.title: Identify what the question is asking for
steps.content:
The question asks for the choice that emphasizes the LOCATION of the figures in A Promise. The notes state that in A Promise two men are “floating on the left side of the canvas” — that spatial detail is the target. Evaluate each choice against this criterion:
  • Choice A — ‘In Rawles’s painting A Promise, two men are depicted on the left side of the canvas.’: directly states where the figures are located on the canvas. ✓
  • Choice B — ‘At 48 by 72 inches, Rawles’s A Promise is even larger than the sizable 48-by-60-inch painting Little Swimmer.’: emphasizes the size of the painting, not the location of the figures. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘While the number of figures may differ, constant among Rawles’s hyperrealistic works is the tranquil mood that the paintings evoke.’: emphasizes mood across paintings, not figure location in A Promise. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘Rawles captures the water in paintings such as Little Swimmer and A Promise in vivid hues of light blue and cobalt.’: emphasizes water color, not figure location. ✗

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Only Choice A identifies where the figures are positioned in A Promise, directly addressing the question’s emphasis on location. That matches choice A — A is correct.
